description: 🏆 Next Play - The Ultimate Sports & Mindset Gift for Teens 🏆 Perfect For Young Athletes, Dreamers And Teens Who Just Want More From Life! 🔥 The Updated Winter 2025/2026 Edition - Fresh Stories, New Energy, And The Original Next Play Challenge Included! Book 1 Of The 4-Part “Next Play Series” - A Complete Journey That Takes Teens From Mastering Their Mindset To Building Discipline, Leadership, And Lasting Purpose. Before You Can Win On The Field, You Have To Win In Your Head. How to Think Like a Champion Before You Even Win What if the lessons that shape your future aren’t taught in a classroom… but in the split seconds between failure and your next move? For teens (and parents) who want real confidence, not clichés - Next Play reveals how the world’s toughest athletes turned setbacks into comebacks and pressure into purpose. It’s not about talent - it’s about mindset. This inspiring playbook helps teens overcome doubt, stay focused and build the resilience to face every challenge head-on - in sports, at school, in friendships and in life. Inside Next Play , Readers Will Find The Stories Behind 25 Legendary Athletes Who Turned Obstacles Into Opportunity And The Lessons That Made Them Unstoppable: 🏀 Michael Jordan — How Getting Cut From The Team Became The Spark That Built A Legacy 🏈 Tom Brady — Proof That Being Underestimated Can Be Your Biggest Advantage 🏊 Michael Phelps — Mastering Focus And Routine To Turn Doubt Into Dominance 🎾 Serena Williams — Redefining Strength, Power, And Purpose On Her Own Terms 🏄 Bethany Hamilton — Learning Courage When The World Tells You To Quit ⚽ Lionel Messi — Showing That Greatness Has No Size Limit 🥊 Muhammad Ali — Leading With Conviction Far Beyond The Ring …And Many More Icons Who Turned Setbacks Into Comebacks And Inspired A Generation. Here’s Exactly What This Book Does for You: Next Play Isn’t Just About Reading Stories - It’s About Learning From Them. Each Chapter Follows A Powerful Structure That Helps Readers Feel, Understand, And Apply What Greatness Really Looks Like. ✅ The Story : Real Moments From Legendary Athletes Like Simone Biles, Wayne Gretzky, And Abby Wambach. ✅ The Turning Point : Where Everything Changes - The Split Second Between Giving Up Or Going Again. ✅ What Really Changed : The Mindset Habits And Small Daily Choices That Built Their Confidence And Success. ✅ The Lesson Behind It : Clear Takeaways That Connect The Athlete’s Journey To Your Own. ✅ What You Can Learn : Actionable Reflections That Turn Each Story Into Personal Growth. ✅ The Challenge : A Short Activity Or Mindset Task At The End Of Every Story - So Readers Practice What They’ve Just Learned. Every section - from Courage and Resilience to Focus and Teamwork - builds on the one before it, helping teens develop a mindset that lasts long after the final page. Your Next Play Starts Now The greatest wins don’t happen on the scoreboard - they happen in your mind. That’s why Next Play doesn’t stop at the stories. It ends with the Next Play Challenge - a unique, interactive mindset test that turns reading into action. Even if you’ve never read an inspirational book before (or never finished one), this one makes it simple - short stories, real lessons and mindset tools you’ll actually use. 👉 The Next Move Is Yours. Click Buy Now - And Make Your Next Play Your Best One Yet! Read more
